title: epilobium roseum subsp. roseum
intro: Epilobium roseum subsp. roseum, also known as Rose Bog Willowherb or Red Willowherb, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to have a range of health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against cancer. The herbal preparations of Epilobium roseum subsp. roseum typically involve drying the plant material and making teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions. Additionally, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make salves or creams, which can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
